queries.question: List all the rooms that cost 150 per night and are either a family suite or single room.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accommodations.RoomNumber 
FROM Accommodations
WHERE (Accommodations.TypeOfAccomodation = "Family Suite" OR Accommodations.TypeOfAccomodation = "Single Room") AND Accommodations.PricePerNight = 150.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?roomnumber WHERE {
  ?accommodations a :Accommodations .
  ?accommodations p:RoomNumber ?roomnumber .
  ?accommodations p:TypeOfAccomodation ?typeofaccomodation_w .
  ?accommodations p:TypeOfAccomodation ?typeofaccomodation_w2 .
  ?accommodations p:PricePerNight ?pricepernight_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typeofaccomodation_w) = "Family Suite" || STR(?typeofaccomodation_w2) = "Single Room")) && (STR(?pricepernight_w) = "150" || STR(?pricepernight_w) = "150.0")))
}

queries.question: Show all the family suites listed, also show the single rooms which cost 150 per night.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accommodations.RoomNumber 
FROM Accommodations
WHERE Accommodations.TypeOfAccomodation = "Family Suite" OR Accommodations.TypeOfAccomodation = "Single Room" AND Accommodations.PricePerNight = 150.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?roomnumber WHERE {
  ?accommodations a :Accommodations .
  ?accommodations p:RoomNumber ?roomnumber .
  ?accommodations p:TypeOfAccomodation ?typeofaccomodation_w .
  ?accommodations p:TypeOfAccomodation ?typeofaccomodation_w2 .
  ?accommodations p:PricePerNight ?pricepernight_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typeofaccomodation_w) = "Family Suite" || (STR(?typeofaccomodation_w2) = "Single Room" && (STR(?pricepernight_w) = "150" || STR(?pricepernight_w) = "150.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Please give me all family suites and single rooms which cost 150 per night.
